title: Judge Essentials Four-Cup Egg Poacher and Stainless Steel Frying Pan, 20cm, Vented Glass Lid and Stay-Cool Handle
features: MAKES FOUR PERFECT POACHED EGGS IN MINUTES - simply fill with hot water, break an egg into the removable cup, and heat the pan until the egg is cooked
EXCELLENT RESULTS - pan is made from solid stainless steel with a thermic base for fast, even heat distribution on Gas, Halogen, Ceramic and Solid Plate hobs
VERSATILE 2-in-1 EGG COOKER - use the plastic cups for perfect poached eggs or coddled eggs or lift out and use the non-stick frying pan for omelettes, fried eggs or scrambled eggs
INDUCTION-READY PAN - thermic base ensures fast, even heat distribution on all kinds of stovetop including gas, halogen, ceramic, solid plate, induction or an aga Key Product Features
RELIABILITY YOU CAN TRUST - Judge has been trusted by families all over the world for its traditional family values, high performance products and award-winning customer service
description: From the manufacturer ABOUT JUDGE Judge homewares have been used in homes for more than a century and are known all over the world for their high quality and impressive performance. Judge is a long-established British firm, based in Bristol, England, built on traditional family values. You can feel very confident in your choice thanks to their award-winning customer support and aftercare. JUDGE ESSENTIALS Whatever your meal prep needs, you can depend on the Judge Essentials cookware range for great results. With everything you need to cook quality meals for every day, our stainless steel and enamel pan sets, frying pans and more will meet your kitchen needs. KEY FEATURES Stainless Steel with Thermic Induction-Ready base Toughened glass lid, with vent to prevent overboiling Dishwasher Safe Suitable for Gas, Electric, Induction, Halogen, Ceramic, & Solid Plate Stay Cool Handles Oven Safe up to 180°C RELIABLE PERFORMANCE Reliable performance from the thermic bases ensure even heat distribution, and allows for versatile cooking: from hob to oven STAY COOL HANDLES Safe and secure handling is ensured due to the easy grip, phenolic low-heat transmission handles EASY TO CLEAN The mirror-polished stainless steel body is safe to use in a dishwasher and you can expect great performance every time from the special thermic base Judge Essentials Large Sauté Pan Judge Essentials Non-Stick Frying Pan Judge Essentials 3-Piece Saucepan Set Judge Essentials Large Casserole Judge Essentials Four-Cup Egg Poacher Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 44 4.4 out of 5 stars 7 4.3 out of 5 stars 97 4.4 out of 5 stars 10,472 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,574 Price — no data — no data £28.38 £ 28 . 38 — no data — no data Stainless Steel ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Dishwasher Safe ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Induction Ready ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
